title: Super High Ball: Pinball Platformer
description:
Master Momentum

Super High Ball is a precision pinball platformer where every bounce matters.

Or just call it a Punishing Puzzle Pinball Precision Physics Platformer.

Use flippers scattered throughout each level to launch the ball over deadly gaps, fire, timed lasers, and brutal traps.

Control cannons, defy gravity, and slow time to line up precise shots and discover the fastest path to the finish.

Deadly Obstacles

Super High Ball is easy to learn, difficult to master, and built for players who love a challenge.

Lasers, fire, bottomless pits, moving hazards, wind, and deadly traps stand between you and the finish. One mistake sends you straight back to the latest checkpoint.

Challenge Goals

Looking for an extra challenge? Complete optional goals on every level to unlock new customizations.

Time limits, death limits, and artifact collection will push your skills to the limit.

 

Global Leaderboards

Race players around the world on the global leaderboards. Every second counts.
description_short: Pinball meets precision platforming! Use flippers to launch the ball through deadly traps, slow time to line up satisfying shots, and master the fastest routes to climb the leaderboards. Complete challenges to unlock customizations.
